faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find everything you need to know about Hypez right here.

q1.question: Is Hypez independent from Discord?
q1.answer: Yes, Hypez is a completely independent initiative. We are not an official part of Discord, but a community-focused platform designed to help Discord communities grow and thrive. We fully comply with Discord's Terms of Service and Community Guidelines.

q2.question: How does the "Boost Server" system work?
q2.answer: With our Premium system, you can move your server to the top of the lists, earn a special Premium badge, and be featured in the "Showcase" section. This ensures your server gets noticed by thousands of potential members faster, helping your community grow rapidly.

q3.question: How can I add my server?
q3.answer: You can register in seconds by adding the Hypez bot to your server. Our bot automatically pulls your server information and creates your profile. You can then edit your description, banner, and tags from the control panel to start promoting your server.

q4.question: Is listing free?
q4.answer: Yes, adding and listing your server on Hypez is completely free. However, if you want to reach more people and benefit from exclusive advantages, you can check out our affordable Premium packages.

faq.title: Payment FAQ
faq.subtitle: Have questions about payments or subscriptions? We've got answers.

q1.question: What payment methods do you accept?
q1.answer: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard), PayPal, and localized payment methods depending on your region. All payments are processed securely via Stripe.

q2.question: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
q2.answer: Yes! You can cancel your subscription at any time from your dashboard. Your benefits will continue until the end of the current billing period.

q3.question: Do you offer refunds?
q3.answer: We offer a 7-day money-back guarantee if you are not satisfied with our Premium services. Please contact our support team to process a refund.

q4.question: What happens if I upgrade in the middle of a cycle?
q4.answer: If you upgrade from Free to Premium mid-cycle, you will only be charged the prorated amount for the remaining days of your current cycle.

help.title: How can we help?
help.subtitle: Check out our frequently asked questions or join our community to contact our support team.
help.supportDesc: Can't find the answer you're looking for? You can contact us directly by joining our official Discord server.

q1.question: What is Hypez.net?
q1.answer: Hypez.net is a modern server listing platform that allows you to discover Discord servers and grow your own server to reach larger audiences.

q2.question: How can I add my server?
q2.answer: Click the 'Add Bot' button in the top right corner or menu to add the Hypez bot to your server. Once added, your server will automatically be listed on the platform.

q3.question: How does the Hype system work?
q3.answer: You earn Hype points as users vote for your server and your server's activity increases. Servers with the highest Hype points rank higher on the Leaderboard.

q4.question: What are the Premium features?
q4.answer: Premium servers are featured in the showcase, prioritized in search results, and can use custom designs (backgrounds, badges) on their profile pages. Visit the 'Billing' tab in your profile to purchase Premium.

q5.question: The bot appears offline, what should I do?
q5.answer: Sometimes the bot may go offline due to Discord API outages. If the problem persists, please join our Support Server and contact the staff.
